global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with engaging text and a prominent logo.
global.main_message: Encouraging new players to win rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: StormByte logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized logo with the text 'StormByte' prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Epic rewards text
elements.description: Text that reads 'Win epic rewards' in a clear, engaging font, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Free rewards text
elements.description: Text that states 'Free rewards for new players' in a smaller font, positioned below the epic rewards text.

elements.label: Top background pattern
elements.description: A geometric pattern or design element at the top of the ad, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Top left element
elements.description: A small, undefined graphic element located in the top left corner.

elements.label: Bottom center element
elements.description: A small, undefined graphic element located at the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Bottom left element
elements.description: A small, undefined graphic element located at the bottom left of the ad.

elements.label: Bottom right element
elements.description: A small, undefined graphic element located at the bottom right of the ad.

elements.label: Top right element
elements.description: A small decorative element in the top right corner, possibly a graphic or icon.

elements.label: Center right element
elements.description: A small, undefined graphic element located in the center right area of the ad.

elements.label: Top left small element
elements.description: A small decorative element in the top left corner, possibly an icon or graphic.

elements.label: Center left element
elements.description: A small, undefined graphic element located in the center left area of the ad.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline 'StormByte' is large and bold, capturing attention at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: The main message 'Win epic rewards Free rewards for new players' is prominently displayed in the center.
elements.text_content: Win epic rewards Free rewards for new players

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button at the bottom that says 'Shop now', inviting user interaction.
